comm_fraction.note: Model-based, not measured on real MPI

mpi_status: TESTED (model) — RCB partitioner and halo exchange work. Comm fraction is model-based, not real MPI measurement.
gpu_status: N/A — parallel engine is MPI-based, not GPU

optimization_priorities.item: Space-filling curve partitioning — better locality than RCB
Non-blocking halo exchange — overlap computation with communication
GPU-aware MPI — CUDA-aware MPI for direct device-to-device transfer
Dynamic load balancing — rebalance during SCF iterations
Multi-GPU support — single-node multi-GPU with NCCL
Real MPI benchmarking — replace model with actual mpirun tests
